_description: Maximize Copilot quota usage to offload Claude Max (Opus 4.7) and ChatGPT Pro Codex direct API. Routes all routine work through Copilot's Sonnet 4.6 (build/define/counter-audit) and gpt-5.3-codex (audit/UX/theming/security). Direct Claude Max only fires when escalated for hard reasoning. Direct ChatGPT Pro Codex unused. Gemini Flash retained for research. Image gen still routes to Codex gpt-image-1 (uses OPENAI_API_KEY, not Copilot).

_offload_strategy.escalation_to_opus: Master agent (Claude Code session) handles escalation when Sonnet 4.6 returns UNCERTAIN on PEC rubric ≥3 times for the same task. Otherwise Sonnet 4.6 via Copilot does the work.
_offload_strategy.expected_copilot_consumption: ~10-30 Premium Requests per typical 1-iteration factory run. Heavy multi-iteration runs may hit ~100. Monitor via copilot session output (Premium count printed per call).
when_to_avoid_this_preset: Truly novel architecture work where Opus reasoning quality matters
Final-iteration release-quality audits where direct ChatGPT Pro Codex catches things Copilot's gpt-5.3-codex misses
Days when GitHub Copilot quota is already low — switch to claude-heavy or balanced

via_copilot: GPT-5.4, GPT-5.3-Codex, GPT-5.2-Codex, GPT-5.2, GPT-5.4 mini, GPT-5 mini, GPT-4.1
NOT_via_copilot: Gemini (any version) — Copilot catalog is GPT + Claude only
GPT-5.5 — does not exist; latest is GPT-5.4 / GPT-5.3-Codex
OpenAI o3 — direct API only, requires OPENAI_API_KEY
_model_availability_notes.image_generation_via_copilot: Not supported. Image gen routes to codex:image (gpt-image-1 via OPENAI_API_KEY) with gemini:image fallback (requires GEMINI_API_KEY).

_tier_semantics.weak: cheap model for mechanical work: commit messages, diff summaries, lint-error interpretation, rubric-scoring. Cost target: 10-30% of primary.
_tier_semantics.editor: code-generation-focused model for actual file edits, when primary is better at reasoning than writing code. Falls back to primary if unset.
